data.title: Happy Money Named Best Consumer Lending Company by FinTech Breakthrough for Second Consecutive Year
data.description: Happy Money has been recognized with an award for its leadership in credit card debt consolidation. The company was praised for its innovative Hive lending platform and eighth-generation credit model. The award highlights Happy Money's dedication to empowering individuals to achieve financial freedom. The recognition was announced in Torrance, California on March 19, 2026.

data.title: CIM Group Sells 177,434-Square-Foot Best Buy Plaza Shopping Center in North Dallas
data.description: In Dallas, CIM Group has successfully sold Best Buy Plaza, a retail shopping center spanning 177,434 square feet located in North Dallas.

data.title: Baristas behind millions of cups of coffee compete globally
data.description: In Vienna, on March 19, 2026, the Julius Meinl Barista Cup 2026 will gather baristas from various countries to compete for the championships. The event aims to showcase the skills and creativity of baristas who play a significant role in crafting over five million cups of Julius Meinl coffee each day.

data.title: HINGE Early Education Advisors to Present Strategic Growth and Exit Planning Insights at AELL 42nd Annual National Conference
data.description: Leading professionals in the industry have offered valuable advice on financial stability, real estate planning, and preparing to exit for owners of early education businesses. This valuable insight was shared in Greenville, South Carolina, on March 19, 2026. With escalating expenses and growing operational challenges impacting early education providers nationwide, the experts focused on crucial strategies to navigate these difficulties. The event provided essential guidance tailored to owners of early education businesses to help them ensure financial wellness, optimize real estate decisions, and prepare for a successful exit. This initiative aimed to address the pressing issues of rising costs and operational complexities that early education providers are encountering.
